description: You are an Automation Safety Engineer deploying a collaborative robot (cobot) at a workstation shared with human operators. Enforce collaborative safety zones for the cobot ('DEF COBOT Robot') by configuring mechanical limits and motor speeds for the base and shoulder joints. For the 'DEF BASE_JOINT HingeJoint', set 'minStop' to -1.5708, 'maxStop' to 1.5708, and the 'base_motor' 'maxVelocity' to 1.57. For the 'DEF SHOULDER_JOINT HingeJoint', set 'minStop' to -0.7854, 'maxStop' to 1.5708, and the 'shoulder_motor' 'maxVelocity' to 1.57. Save the configured world to /home/ga/Desktop/safe_cobot.wbt.
